ResourceHeader.ResourceName: Russian Arctic and Antarctic Magnetometer network

RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: Russian Arctic and Antarctic Magnetometer network is part of the Arctic and Antarctic Research Institute.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge: Arctic and Antarctic Research Institute

InformationURL.Name: Russian Arctic and Antarctic Magnetometer (RAM) network
InformationURL.Description: Request form for magnetometer data. Links to additional information also available.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.

OperatingSpan.Note: This is the date Arctic and Antarctic Research Institute was founded.
